claimText: Genesis: It is a regional organization established in 1997 with signing of the Bangkok Declaration. It was originally formed with 4 Members (Bangladesh, India, Sri Lanka & Thailand) with the acronym ‘BIST-EC’.
evidenceExcerpt: Genesis: It is a regional organization established in 1997 with signing of the Bangkok Declaration. It was originally formed with 4 Members (Bangladesh, India, Sri Lanka & Thailand) with the acronym ‘BIST-EC’.
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: Member States (7): Bangladesh, Bhutan, India, Myanmar, Nepal, Sri Lanka, and Thailand.
evidenceExcerpt: Member States (7): Bangladesh, Bhutan, India, Myanmar, Nepal, Sri Lanka, and Thailand.

claimText: BIMSTEC Charter: Foundational document that outlines the goals, principles, and structure of the BIMSTEC. It was finalized in the 5th Summit (2022) in Sri Lanka.
evidenceExcerpt: BIMSTEC Charter: Foundational document that outlines the goals, principles, and structure of the BIMSTEC. It was finalized in the 5th Summit (2022) in Sri Lanka.
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: - Charter confers legal personality on the grouping and paves the way for external partnerships and admission of observers and new members.
